public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as cell broker.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a cell broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of cell broker in and around Forge Dedication Halls, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Forge Dedication Halls workable through the obligations of cell broker while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Forge Dedication Halls, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of cell broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Cindri Cindercrest can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Cindri Cindercrest will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Cindri Cindercrest read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Forge Dedication Halls: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
